release-2.description:
## Wikipelago v0.1.1

Beta update for Wikipelago.

### Changes
- Expanded article pools across all supported categories
- Added many more titles, so category-restricted seeds are less likely to fail
- Tightened category filtering so disabled categories do not leak into seeds
- Removed the web client search bar to prevent direct target skipping
- Updated web client cache versioning for cleaner deploys
- Improved reconnect behavior so the web client can preserve progress after disconnects (recovery may still not be fully reliable)

### Included Categories
- Video Games
- Board Games
- Movies
- TV Shows
- Anime/Manga
- Sports
- Science/Space
- Technology/Internet
- History
- Geography/Landmarks
- Food/Cuisine
- Art/Literature
- Mythology/Folklore

### Notes
- Recommended Archipelago version: `0.6.6`
- Reconnect progress restoration is still not fully reliable in all cases
- If using a narrow category setup with very high round counts, generation may still require enabling more categories or lowering `check_count`

### Files
This release should be used with:
- `Wikipelago.apworld`
- updated Wikipelago YAML template
- latest deployed web client

### Thanks
Thanks to everyone for testing and sending feedback. The reports directly helped improve seed quality and category behavior.
release-2.title: Wikipelago 1.1

releases.description:
## Wikipelago v0.1.0 (Public Beta)

First public release of Wikipelago for Archipelago.

### Included
- Custom `Wikipelago.apworld` for Archipelago 0.6.6
- Web client + bridge deployment support
- Reconnect/session progress restoration support
- Expanded article system with category toggles in YAML
- No-repeat round generation logic
- Goal completion + fragment-based progression flow
- Updated YAML template and setup docs

### Notes
- Recommended Archipelago version: 0.6.6
- If hosting on free Render, cold starts may occur after inactivity.
- Players should use the included YAML template and the same APWorld version used for generation.

### Known Limitations
- Hosting uptime depends on your deployment provider/tier.
- Category/topic classification is keyword-based and may still classify edge-case pages imperfectly.
releases.title: Wikipelago 1.0

v0.2.0.description:
## Wikipelago v0.2.0


### Major Changes
- Grand Goal logic now correctly requires only the configured Knowledge Fragment count
- Improved default settings to reduce early BK risk in asyncs and community games
- Added clearer YAML guidance for safer setting combinations
- Added Searchsanity and Scrollsanity support (optional, disabled by default)
- Improved reconnect/resume behavior in the web client
- Expanded validation and fuzz testing tools for safer updates

### Recommended Defaults
The included YAML template now uses a safer baseline for play:
- `check_count: 25`
- `required_fragments: 5`
- `start_rounds_unlocked: 10`
- `rounds_per_unlock: 5`
- `random_goal_article: true`

### Notes
- Recommended Archipelago version: `0.6.6`
- Searchsanity and Scrollsanity are currently optional and off by default
- Reconnect behavior is improved, but continued real-world testing is still encouraged

### Included
- Updated `Wikipelago.apworld`
- Updated YAML template
- Updated web client / bridge source
- Netlify config for frontend hosting with backend proxying

### Thanks
Thanks to everyone who tested seeds, reported broken targets, and gave sync pacing feedback. Those reports directly shaped this update.
v0.2.0.title: Wikipelago v0.2.0
